rationale: The lemma `Finset.cardinal_union_le_addition` does not exist in Mathlib; the correct lemma is `Finset.card_union_le` with signature `(s t : Finset α) : (s ∪ t).card ≤ s.card + t.card`. This is a fabricated declaration.
rubric_evidence: Finset.cardinal_union_le_addition (s t : Finset α) : Cardinal.mk (s ∪ t : Set α) ≤ Cardinal.mk s + Cardinal.mk t
